title: pilosella horrida
intro: Pilosella horrida, also known as mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pilosella horrida include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive discomfort, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
